artPrompt: An ongoing eerie scene: a tarnished collection plate drifts of its own accord through the air above a ring of seated ashen congregants, tilting expectantly, cold-gold coins glinting on its worn surface as candle smoke trails behind it. The wide frame sets the floating plate high in a single beam of pale light, the worshippers fading into deep black below, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Collection Plate Passes Itself Around the Table
text:
Physically pass this card clockwise around the table. Each player it reaches must donate: reveal a card from hand and give it to the player on their left, OR put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and keep their cards, you cheapskate.
When the plate returns to you, draw a card for each card that was donated this way, then gain 1 life for each doom counter added. Generosity and guilt both pay out.
flavorText: It came around the table once. It is still going. It has developed opinions.

extras.physicalAction: pass the card around the table
